full_text:
Lü Jian 呂建
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Jian (呂建). Xu Huang’s second in command, he helped defeat Guan Ping’s army. Lü Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
